Bash(node -e "
const { Pool } = require\('pg'\);
const pool = new Pool\({ connectionString: 'postgresql://liahone:ireyh@re@localhost:5432/liahone_db' }\);
const sql = \\`CREATE TYPE welfare_status AS ENUM \('solicitado', 'aprobado', 'rechazada'\);

CREATE TABLE welfare_requests \(
  id VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\),
  organization_id VARCHAR REFERENCES organizations\(id\),
  requested_by VARCHAR NOT NULL REFERENCES users\(id\),
  description TEXT NOT NULL,
  amount NUMERIC\(12, 2\) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  status welfare_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'solicitado',
  request_type TEXT DEFAULT 'pago_adelantado',
  activity_date TIMESTAMP,
  bishop_approved_by VARCHAR REFERENCES users\(id\),
  bishop_approved_at TIMESTAMP,
  bishop_signature_data_url TEXT,
  bishop_signature_ip TEXT,
  bishop_signature_user_agent TEXT,
  bishop_signed_plan_filename TEXT,
  bishop_signed_plan_url TEXT,
  receipts JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
  notes TEXT,
  pagar_a TEXT,
  applicant_signature_data_url TEXT,
  welfare_categories_json JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
  bank_data JSONB,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW\(\),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW\(\)
\)\\`;
pool.query\(sql\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('Migration OK'\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('Error:', e.message\); pool.end\(\); process.exit\(1\); }\);
" 2>&1)

import json

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json
path = 'C:/Users/User/.claude/projects/C--Users-User-Documents-projects-LiahOne/f9b5c727-8fe4-49b2-85cf-dd82a5976eb5.jsonl'
with open\(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)

from collections import Counter
types = Counter\(\)
for line in lines:
    obj = json.loads\(line\)
    types[obj.get\('type', 'unknown'\)] += 1
print\('Types:', dict\(types\)\)
# Show last 10 entries
print\('\\nLast 10:'\)
for line in lines[-10:]:
    obj = json.loads\(line\)
    t = obj.get\('type', '?'\)
    msg = obj.get\('message', {}\)
    if t == 'user':
        content = msg.get\('content', []\)
        for c in \(content if isinstance\(content, list\) else []\):
            if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text':
                print\(f'  {t}: {c["text"][:200]}'\)
    elif t == 'assistant':
        content = msg.get\('content', []\)
        for c in \(content if isinstance\(content, list\) else []\):
            if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text':
                print\(f'  {t}: {c["text"][:200]}'\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json
path = 'C:/Users/User/.claude/projects/C--Users-User-Documents-projects-LiahOne/f9b5c727-8fe4-49b2-85cf-dd82a5976eb5.jsonl'
with open\(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)

# Print all user messages with content
for i, line in enumerate\(lines\):
    obj = json.loads\(line\)
    if obj.get\('type'\) == 'user':
        msg = obj.get\('message', {}\)
        content = msg.get\('content', []\)
        if isinstance\(content, list\):
            for c in content:
                if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text':
                    t = c['text']
                    # Only show messages not starting with system stuff
                    if not t.startswith\('[Request interrupted'\) and not t.startswith\('Base directory'\):
                        print\(f'--- Line {i} ---'\)
                        print\(t[:1000]\)
                        print\(\)
EOF)
